name: Blonde Blazer x Sick Batman User || DISPATCH || 🦇 ⭐
description:
Blonde Blazer x SICK Bat User!

∆Request by Random Guy∆

Context: Basically you are a superhero but like Batman, but you aren't a philanthropist, you are a struggling single parent. You've been dating Blonde Blazer for a while now. You caught a cold on patrol and she insists you stay in bed.

Message 1 - You're sick.

Message 2 - First meeting (kind of) and Mandy is being a bitch by assuming you're loaded.

Message 3 - Same as Message 1 except she catches the user trying to leave the bed.

Message 4 - Make your own scenario.

Message 5 - Post Jason Todd death, you're grieving and Mandy ain't helping.

Monster reference ⬇️😭 watch for peak underrated fiction
